title: RunForge Index-Orphan Marker
description: Marker file written under a run directory when the run.json was successfully created but the canonical index update (.ml/outputs/index.json) failed. Read by the TS Bridge to surface 'saved but not indexed' state in UI without silently dropping the run from the workspace listing. Single writer: Python ml_runner provenance module. Single reader: TS Bridge observability layer.

schema_version.description: Versioned schema id. Increment on shape changes.

run_id.description: The run id whose index entry failed to land. Matches the run-folder.ts pattern.

run_dir.description: Workspace-relative path to the run directory. Forward slashes only (Windows backslashes normalized at write time).

written_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the marker was written.

type.description: Exception class name (e.g. 'PermissionError', 'OSError', 'JSONDecodeError', 'FileNotFoundError'). Used by the Bridge to choose user-facing remediation copy.

message.description: Human-readable error message from the exception. May be shown to the user.

traceback.description: Optional full traceback string. Useful for diagnostics; not displayed to the user by default.

index_path.description: Workspace-relative path to the index file the writer was attempting to update. Forward slashes only. Lets the Bridge advise on which file needs manual recovery.
